adapter_is_workspace_library.detail: pi-grok-adapter is a library-only workspace member; the former standalone TUI target is absent

adapter_has_no_terminal_dependencies.detail: no terminal/rendering dependencies in the Pi adapter

adapter_has_no_renderer_input_or_termina.detail: adapter only translates Pi JSONL RPC to ACP

composition_binary_is_native_grok_packag.detail: grok-pi is a second composition root in xai-grok-pager-bin

binary_enters_production_grok_pager.detail: grok-pi enters Grok's production terminal initialization, writer, event loop and restore path

native_grok_tui_components_present.detail: native prompt, slash, question, status, scrollback, minimal and Markdown components are present

uploaded_grok_tree_is_byte_identical_out.detail: 2696 uploaded Grok files are SHA-256 identical; only 19 declared semantic/manifest seams may differ

native_renderer_input_markdown_hashes_ma.detail: 283 native renderer/input/Markdown files match the uploaded Grok source

modified_surface_is_exact_and_semantic.detail: exactly 19 workspace/ACP/state/dispatch/slash seams are declared; no renderer module is mutable

no_fallback_or_old_custom_tui.detail: no fallback acknowledgement, old pi-grok-tui crate, or custom renderer remains

slash_surface_uses_grok_native_commands_.detail: retained 20 existing Grok UI or ACP-backed commands; no adapter-specific slash UI

pi_commands_are_dynamic_acp_commands.detail: Pi extension/prompt/skill commands are discovered from get_commands and merged by Grok's native ACP slash registry

adapter_rpc_calls_exist_in_uploaded_pi.detail: validated 13 adapter RPC calls against Pi rpc-types.ts

all_pi_extension_ui_methods_use_native_g.detail: all 9 Pi Extension UI methods map to Grok toast/status/widget/title/prompt/question surfaces

pi_runtime_events_are_projected_to_acp.detail: validated 20 Pi lifecycle, stream, tool, queue, compaction, retry and UI event routes

adapter_event_routes_exist_in_uploaded_p.detail: all 20 routed events exist in the uploaded Pi source contract

pi_semantics_feed_grok_native_views.detail: history, Markdown/reasoning streams, images, tools, model/effort, steer/follow-up and Bash are mapped into ACP

extension_dialog_semantics_match_pi.detail: Pi timeouts cancel Grok QuestionView; confirm/value/cancel response shapes match rpc-types.ts

documentation_describes_native_grok_arch.detail: README and capabilities identify the production Grok pager and the headless Pi adapter
